headline: Energy Transition Update - Solar Success Powers Sustainable Growth In The Carolinas
summary: Ever.green has successfully completed the Pruger Solar project, a 2-megawatt solar initiative in Marion County, South Carolina, marking its third project in the Carolinas within a year. This development was made possible through the purchase of High-Impact Renewable Energy Certificates (RECs) by various corporate buyers, including REI Co-op and Cutler Development. By securing long-term REC contracts, these companies facilitate the financing of solar projects that may otherwise stall, thereby...

headline: Chip stocks plunge, but bargain-hunters stem losses in other tech names
summary: U.S. chip stocks stumbled on Tuesday, but the broader market's initial slump brought out bargain-hunting investors, stemming the falloff in other companies central to the AI infrastructure rally that have powered the market over the last few ‌years.  The tech-heavy Nasdaq Composite index was still down 1.4%, wiping out around $680 billion in market value in morning trading on Tuesday.  Elon Musk's ‌SpaceX briefly traded below $2 trillion in market cap for the first time since its debut earlier this month before rebounding into positive territory.

content.title: Chip stocks plunge, but bargain-hunters stem losses in other tech names
content.summary: U.S. chip stocks stumbled on Tuesday, but the broader market's initial slump brought out bargain-hunting investors, stemming the falloff in other companies central to the AI infrastructure rally that have powered the market over the last few ‌years.  The tech-heavy Nasdaq Composite index was still down 1.4%, wiping out around $680 billion in market value in morning trading on Tuesday.  Elon Musk's ‌SpaceX briefly traded below $2 trillion in market cap for the first time since its debut earlier this month before rebounding into positive territory.
